scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mergepilot/agents && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:e2e:electron: npm run build && node scripts/preflight-electron-linux.mjs && npm run rebuild:electron && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts; status=$?; npm run rebuild:node; restore=$?; if [ $status -ne 0 ]; then exit $status; fi; exit $restore
scripts.verify:runtime: npm run test:e2e:web && npm run test:e2e:electron
scripts.smoke: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-desktop.mjs && node scripts/smoke-agents.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run smoke
